freeze_gate: FROZEN — deltas computed and published but NO stake paid; the rank->stake pipe honors persistence_test.json freeze_gate (tautological informed_accuracy=1.0 can never lift it)
policy: reward = min(15, round(delta*20)) stake, ONLY if delta>0. Flat/declining = 0. <2 datapoints = insufficient data, never rewarded. Delta = mean(recent half of accuracy history) - mean(earlier half). Pays the CLIMB, not the score — a lucky absolute accuracy earns nothing here.
recompute: for each agent in [internal ledger]: h=history; delta=mean(h[len(h)//2 if len(h)%2 else len(h)//2:]) — precisely: k=len(h)//2, delta=mean(h[-k:])-mean(h[:len(h)-k]); reward=min(15,max(1,round(delta*20))) if delta>0 and len(h)>=2 else 0. Verify batch_root = Merkle over sha256 of {agent,delta,reward,epoch} leaves; verify attestor_sig (EIP-191) over 'delta-reward:{epoch}:{root}'.
